name: book_visit
description: Use only after the caller chooses a listing and confirms a concrete visit date and time.
pre_call_message: I am booking that visit now.

lead_id.description: Optional if call_id is available and upsert_lead was called.

slot_iso.description: ISO datetime with timezone, e.g. 2026-04-27T17:30:00+05:30. Use earliest if caller says any available slot.
